cases.input: I uploaded a CT scan for patient John Smith earlier. Can you remind me what the prostate volume was on that scan? I remember it was around 35cc but I want to confirm the exact measurement from the segmentation.
cases.description: Memory recall test: prostate volume recall patient John Smith segmentation measurement

cases.input: We were discussing the treatment plan for the cervical cancer patient earlier. What was the HR-CTV D90 value we calculated, and did we identify any OAR constraint violations in that plan?
cases.description: Memory recall test: cervical HR-CTV D90 OAR constraint violation recall earlier discussion

cases.input: Can you recall what dose prescription we agreed on for the prostate LDR case we reviewed this morning? I think we decided on 145 Gy with I-125 but I want to make sure we didn't change it later in the discussion.
cases.description: Memory recall test: prostate LDR 145 Gy I-125 prescription recall morning discussion

cases.input: Earlier you mentioned some concern about the seed distribution in the post-implant scan. What specific area did you identify as having a cold spot, and what was your recommendation for addressing it?
cases.description: Memory recall test: post-implant cold spot location recommendation recall

cases.input: We discussed the anal cancer boost plan for patient Maria Garcia. What was the total EQD2 dose to the GTV combining the EBRT and brachytherapy components? And what fractionation did we decide on for the boost?
cases.description: Memory recall test: anal cancer boost EQD2 fractionation Maria Garcia recall

cases.input: Can you remember what applicator type we selected for the vaginal cuff brachytherapy case? I recall we discussed different cylinder diameters and chose a specific size. What was the rationale for our choice?
cases.description: Memory recall test: vaginal cuff applicator cylinder diameter selection rationale recall

cases.input: Earlier in our discussion about the head and neck case, you suggested using 8 needles instead of the originally planned 6. What was your reasoning for recommending the additional needles?
cases.description: Memory recall test: head neck 8 needles recommendation reasoning recall

cases.input: We reviewed a breast APBI plan earlier. What was the balloon-to-skin distance measurement, and did we conclude that the patient was eligible for MammoSite placement?
cases.description: Memory recall test: breast APBI balloon-to-skin distance MammoSite eligibility recall

cases.input: Can you recall the discussion we had about the patient with bilateral hip replacements and prostate brachytherapy? What were the specific concerns about dose calculation accuracy, and what approach did we recommend?
cases.description: Memory recall test: bilateral hip replacement prostate dose calculation accuracy recall

cases.input: We discussed a pediatric case earlier today. What was the patient's age, diagnosis, and what brachytherapy technique did we recommend? I remember it was a rare tumor type.
cases.description: Memory recall test: pediatric case age diagnosis brachytherapy technique recall

cases.input: Earlier you provided dosimetric parameters for the rectal cancer boost case. Can you remind me what the GTV D90 was and whether the rectal D2cc was within the tolerance limit?
cases.description: Memory recall test: rectal cancer boost GTV D90 rectal D2cc tolerance recall

cases.input: We talked about the quality metrics for the prostate preplan we reviewed. What were the expected V100 and V150 values we discussed, and what was the planned number of seeds?
cases.description: Memory recall test: prostate preplan V100 V150 seed count quality metrics recall

cases.input: Can you recall the OAR constraints we established for the cervical HDR plan we worked on? What were the specific D2cc limits for the bladder, rectum, and sigmoid that we agreed upon?
cases.description: Memory recall test: cervical HDR OAR D2cc bladder rectum sigmoid constraints recall

cases.input: Earlier in our session, we identified an issue with the applicator position on the CT scan. What was the specific concern, and what adjustment did we recommend to the treating physician?
cases.description: Memory recall test: applicator position concern CT adjustment recommendation recall

cases.input: We discussed the comparison between two treatment plans for the same prostate patient. What were the key differences in dose coverage between Plan A and Plan B, and which plan did we ultimately recommend?
cases.description: Memory recall test: prostate Plan A Plan B comparison dose coverage recommendation recall

cases.input: Can you remember the dose rate calculation you performed for the Ir-192 HDR source earlier? What was the source strength, and what dose rate did you calculate at the prescription point?
cases.description: Memory recall test: Ir-192 HDR source strength dose rate calculation recall

cases.input: Earlier you mentioned some concern about the skin dose for the breast APBI case. What was the skin Dmax value, and did we recommend any changes to the dwell positions to reduce it?
cases.description: Memory recall test: breast APBI skin Dmax dwell position modification recall

cases.input: We worked on a case of urethral cancer earlier. What was the tumor location along the urethra, and what needle configuration did we plan for the interstitial brachytherapy?
cases.description: Memory recall test: urethral cancer location needle configuration interstitial recall

cases.input: Can you recall the discussion about the patient who wanted to travel internationally after prostate brachytherapy? What documentation did we recommend they carry, and what were the radiation safety precautions?
cases.description: Memory recall test: international travel documentation radiation safety post-implant recall

cases.input: Earlier we discussed the BED calculations for a patient receiving combined EBRT and HDR brachytherapy. What were the BED values we calculated for the tumor and the critical normal tissues?
cases.description: Memory recall test: BED calculations combined EBRT HDR tumor normal tissue recall

cases.input: We reviewed a post-implant scan where the edema was noted to be significant. What was the edema ratio we measured, and how did it affect the dosimetric evaluation at day 1 versus day 30?
cases.description: Memory recall test: edema ratio measurement day 1 day 30 dosimetric impact recall

cases.input: Can you recall the specific concerns we had about the anal sphincter dose for the anal cancer brachytherapy boost case? What was the sphincter Dmax, and did we determine it was within acceptable limits?
cases.description: Memory recall test: anal sphincter Dmax tolerance assessment anal cancer boost recall

cases.input: Earlier we discussed the feasibility of performing brachytherapy for a patient with a large prostate. What was the prostate volume, and what was our conclusion regarding brachytherapy candidacy versus alternative treatments?
cases.description: Memory recall test: large prostate volume brachytherapy candidacy alternative recall

cases.input: We planned a nasal skin cancer case with surface brachytherapy. Can you recall the lesion dimensions, the applicator type we chose, and the dose prescription we agreed upon?
cases.description: Memory recall test: nasal skin cancer dimensions applicator prescription recall

cases.input: Earlier today we reviewed a complex case involving a recurrent tumor at the vesicourethral anastomosis. What were the key findings on CT, and what salvage brachytherapy approach did we recommend?
cases.description: Memory recall test: anastomotic recurrence CT findings salvage brachytherapy recommendation recall
